age.evidence: Agent: Kyun sir kya 65 se zyada age hai? Customer: Haan zyada hai.

gender.evidence: Agent: Hello sir good afternoon main Gaurav baat kar raha hun sir HDFC Life se.

temperature.evidence: Customer: Nahi ye kaam nahi karega mere mere upar apply mat karo ye kaam nahi karega.

objections.quote: Nahi mujhe abhi income income nahi chahiye mujhe abhi.
Nahi nahi mere paas dekhiye mere paas HDFC Click to Invest ke kaafi saare plan hai.

investment_sophistication.evidence: Customer: Nahi nahi main ye kya karunga mera investment investment jo main karta hun wo karta hun aur do saal teen saal char jo bhi karta hun uske baad wo jo bhi matured hota hai wo leta hun main.

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: Nahi ye kaam nahi karega mere mere upar apply mat karo ye kaam nahi karega.

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer is over 65 and already has existing investments; agent's product pitch was irrelevant to his current needs.

approachability.reasoning: Customer explicitly stated the pitch would not work on him and declined further engagement regarding his family members.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent introduced himself as being from HDFC Life and immediately pitched a guaranteed income plan, which the customer questioned.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was dismissive and resistant, repeatedly rejecting the agent's offers and questioning the relevance of the pitch.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer rejected the agent's attempt to pivot to a family member's name after revealing he was over 65.
call_narrative.ending: The agent thanked the customer and ended the call after the customer stated his children were well-settled and did not need policies.

key_quotes: Nahi mujhe abhi income income nahi chahiye mujhe abhi.
Nahi ye kaam nahi karega mere mere upar apply mat karo ye kaam nahi karega.
